MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Mar-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories set #2 is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $373.80 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion For An Order To : 1) Compel X-Defts To Permit And Attend Inspection Of Premise; And 2) Award Sanctions (Atty'S Fees And Costs)
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Continued To Apr-27-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Agatha Ekeh and Inocent Ekeh's motion to compel cross defendants David and Janet Dean to permit an inspection is continued to April 27, 2006 at 10:30 a.m. at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion For An Order To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories; Speacial Interrogatories; Award Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Janet Dean and David Dean Cross-defendants in propria persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Agatha Ekeh, Inocent Ekeh's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories (set #1) and special interrogatories (set #1) is granted. No opposition has been filed. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiffs are ordered to serve further responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $363.80 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vicky Chan for defendant and moving party: Innocent Ekeh

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $373.80 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
